languages.text: Стоит вам взяться за клинок, как стражники срываются с места. Вы вскидываете меч, пытаясь защититься, — и он рассыпается, словно стеклянный.

traits.locale_text: Стоит вам взяться за клинок, как стражники срываются с места. Вы вскидываете меч, пытаясь защититься, — и он рассыпается, словно стеклянный.

languages.text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.
languages.original_text: Стоит вам взяться за клинок, как стражники срываются с места. Вы вскидываете меч, пытаясь защититься, — и он рассыпается, словно стеклянный.

traits.locale_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.
As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.
As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

languages.text: Als du die Klinge aufhebst, stürzen die Wachen auf dich zu. Du hebst das Schwert, um dich zu verteidigen ... und es zersplittert wie Glas.
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: Als du die Klinge aufhebst, stürzen die Wachen auf dich zu. Du hebst das Schwert, um dich zu verteidigen ... und es zersplittert wie Glas.

languages.text: 你刚拿起那把剑，守卫就从各自的岗位上冲了出来。你举剑自卫，剑却像玻璃一样瞬间碎裂。
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: 你刚拿起那把剑，守卫就从各自的岗位上冲了出来。你举剑自卫，剑却像玻璃一样瞬间碎裂。

languages.text: Au moment où vous vous emparez de la lame, les gardes affluent vers vous. Vous levez l'épée pour vous défendre, mais elle se brise en mille morceaux.
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: Au moment où vous vous emparez de la lame, les gardes affluent vers vous. Vous levez l'épée pour vous défendre, mais elle se brise en mille morceaux.

languages.text: En cuanto agarras el arma, los guardias abandonan sus puestos y se lanzan sobre ti. Alzas la espada para defenderte... y se hace añicos como si fuese de cristal.
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: En cuanto agarras el arma, los guardias abandonan sus puestos y se lanzan sobre ti. Alzas la espada para defenderte... y se hace añicos como si fuese de cristal.

languages.text: Kılıcı eline alır almaz muhafızlar yerlerinden fırlıyor. Kendini savunmak için kılıcı kaldırıyorsun... Cam gibi paramparça oluyor.
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: Kılıcı eline alır almaz muhafızlar yerlerinden fırlıyor. Kendini savunmak için kılıcı kaldırıyorsun... Cam gibi paramparça oluyor.

languages.text: 剣を手にすると、警備兵が駆け寄ってくる。剣を構えて防御するが、ガラスのように砕けてしまう。
languages.original_text: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.

traits.locale_text: 剣を手にすると、警備兵が駆け寄ってくる。剣を構えて防御するが、ガラスのように砕けてしまう。
